Do not answer knocking after midnight tonight.
Something in the dark knows your exact location.
Your reflection may blink before you do tonight.
A costume nearby hides something that never removed its mask.
You may hear breathing from an empty room.
Tonight’s shadows are deeper than they should be.
Something follows you home from the Halloween night.
The thing outside your window is pretending to be human.
A voice may call your name from somewhere impossible.
The universe whispers: 'Do not look behind you tonight.'
The scarecrow in the field was facing a different direction yesterday.
You may hear breathing from somewhere inside your home tonight.
The fog outside feels almost intelligent.
Something follows behind you when leaves crunch after dark.
Tonight’s moonlight reveals shapes that should not exist.
The thing outside your window knows you noticed it.
A nearby jack-o'-lantern may continue glowing after the candle dies.
You may see someone standing among the trees tonight.
The darkness tonight feels hungry.
The universe whispers: 'October remembers things humanity forgot.'
Something outside knows when you look away from the window.
The footsteps behind you tonight do not belong to a person.
Your reflection may continue moving after you stop.
The scarecrow was closer to the road yesterday.
A nearby voice may speak words meant only for you.
Something waits patiently beyond the treeline tonight.
The moonlight tonight feels dangerously alive.
You may hear scratching from somewhere inside the walls.
Something in the darkness smiles when you become afraid.
The universe whispers: 'Do not follow the voice calling your name tonight.'
